reference.businessDescription: BOM、ECO、工单物料需求和技术发货查询参考 SQL family。
coreJoins: PUB.ECORev -> PUB.ECOMtl ON Company + AltMethod + GroupID + PartNum + RevisionNum
reference.representativeSql:
SELECT a.PartNum,a.RevisionNum,a.Approved,a.ApprovedBy, a.ApprovedDate,b.PullAsAsm,b.ViewAsAsm,
b.QtyPer,b.MtlSeq,b.MtlPartNum,b.MfgComment,c.PartDescription
FROM PUB.ECORev a
LEFT JOIN PUB.ECOMtl b 
ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.RevisionNum = b.RevisionNum AND a.PartNum = b.PartNum AND a.GroupID = b.GroupID AND a.AltMethod = b.AltMethod )
LEFT JOIN PUB.Part c
ON (b.MtlPartNum= c.PartNum AND b.Company = c.Company)
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' 
order by b.mtlseq asc

reference.familyName: 产品报价明细 / 产品配置
reference.businessDescription: 产品报价、产品配置和合同配置外部库参考 SQL family。
reference.representativeSql:
SELECT a.*
        FROM JCJDY.dbo.ProductQuotationDetail a
        WHERE 1=1
		  ${ if(len(ContractNo) == 0,""," and a.Fid in (select id from JCJDY.dbo.ProductQuotation where contractno = N'"+ ContractNo +"') ")}

template.name: 库存查询
template.questionPattern: 按物料、仓库、库位、产品群组查询库存

joins: Erp.PartWhse -> Erp.PartBin ON Company + PartNum + WarehouseCode
Erp.PartBin -> Erp.WhseBin ON Company + BinNum + WarehouseCode
Erp.Warehse -> Erp.WhseBin ON Company + BinNum + WarehouseCode
limitations: 草稿来自 family_027；去除硬编码公司、仓库和产品群组，使用可选参数过滤。
draft only; must pass guard and manual approval before execution

template.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  p.Company AS [公司],
  p.PartNum AS [物料编号],
  p.PartDescription AS [物料描述],
  p.ProdCode AS [产品群组],
  pw.WarehouseCode AS [仓库],
  wh.Description AS [仓库名称],
  pb.BinNum AS [库位],
  wb.Description AS [库位描述],
  pw.OnHandQty AS [仓库库存],
  pb.OnhandQty AS [库位库存]
FROM Erp.Part p
LEFT JOIN Erp.PartWhse pw ON pw.Company = p.Company AND pw.PartNum = p.PartNum
LEFT JOIN Erp.PartBin pb ON pb.Company = pw.Company AND pb.PartNum = pw.PartNum AND pb.WarehouseCode = pw.WarehouseCode
LEFT JOIN Erp.Warehse wh ON wh.Company = pw.Company AND wh.WarehouseCode = pw.WarehouseCode
LEFT JOIN Erp.WhseBin wb ON wb.Company = pb.Company AND wb.WarehouseCode = pb.WarehouseCode AND wb.BinNum = pb.BinNum
WHERE (@companyScope IS NULL OR p.Company = @companyScope)
  AND (@partNum IS NULL OR p.PartNum = @partNum)
  AND (@partDescription IS NULL OR p.PartDescription LIKE CONCAT('%', @partDescription, '%'))
  AND (@warehouseCode IS NULL OR pw.WarehouseCode = @warehouseCode)
  AND (@binNum IS NULL OR pb.BinNum = @binNum)
  AND (@prodCode IS NULL OR p.ProdCode = @prodCode)
  AND (@onlyNonZeroStock = 0 OR COALESCE(pb.OnhandQty, pw.OnHandQty, 0) <> 0)
template.notes: 草稿来自 family_027；去除硬编码公司、仓库和产品群组，使用可选参数过滤。
joins: Erp.PartWhse -> Erp.PartBin ON Company + PartNum + WarehouseCode
Erp.PartBin -> Erp.WhseBin ON Company + BinNum + WarehouseCode
Erp.Warehse -> Erp.WhseBin ON Company + BinNum + WarehouseCode

compileValidation.expandedCompileSql:
SELECT TOP 0 * FROM (
SELECT
  p.Company AS [公司],
  p.PartNum AS [物料编号],
  p.PartDescription AS [物料描述],
  p.ProdCode AS [产品群组],
  pw.WarehouseCode AS [仓库],
  wh.Description AS [仓库名称],
  pb.BinNum AS [库位],
  wb.Description AS [库位描述],
  pw.OnHandQty AS [仓库库存],
  pb.OnhandQty AS [库位库存]
FROM Erp.Part p
LEFT JOIN Erp.PartWhse pw ON pw.Company = p.Company AND pw.PartNum = p.PartNum
LEFT JOIN Erp.PartBin pb ON pb.Company = pw.Company AND pb.PartNum = pw.PartNum AND pb.WarehouseCode = pw.WarehouseCode
LEFT JOIN Erp.Warehse wh ON wh.Company = pw.Company AND wh.WarehouseCode = pw.WarehouseCode
LEFT JOIN Erp.WhseBin wb ON wb.Company = pb.Company AND wb.WarehouseCode = pb.WarehouseCode AND wb.BinNum = pb.BinNum
WHERE ('jctimes' IS NULL OR p.Company = 'jctimes')
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR p.PartNum = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR p.PartDescription LIKE CONCAT('%', NULL, '%'))
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR pw.WarehouseCode = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR pb.BinNum = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR p.ProdCode = NULL)
  AND (0 = 0 OR COALESCE(pb.OnhandQty, pw.OnHandQty, 0) <> 0)
) AS draft_validate

draft only; must pass guard and manual approval before execution

template.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  d.Company AS [公司],
  d.JCDept AS [部门编号],
  d.Description AS [部门名称],
  rg.ResourceGrpID AS [资源群组],
  rg.Description AS [资源群组名称]
FROM Erp.JCDept d
LEFT JOIN Erp.ResourceGroup rg ON rg.Company = d.Company AND rg.JCDept = d.JCDept
WHERE (@companyScope IS NULL OR d.Company = @companyScope)
  AND (@departmentName IS NULL OR d.Description = @departmentName)
  AND (@resourceGroupId IS NULL OR rg.ResourceGrpID = @resourceGroupId)
template.notes: 草稿来自 family_014；作为报工和设备分析的部门/资源群组参数辅助查询。

template.name: 研发工单物料需求查询
template.questionPattern: 查询研发工单、装配和物料需求
template.normalizedQuestion: 研发工单 BOM / 研发物料发料

joins: Erp.JobAsmbl -> Erp.JobMtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
Erp.PartTran -> Erp.JobAsmbl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
Erp.JobHead -> Erp.PartTran ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
Erp.JobHead -> Erp.PartTran ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum + PartNum
Erp.Project -> Erp.JobMtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
sourceReportNames: 研发工单BOM加工费发放查询
研发工单物料发放情况查询
limitations: 草稿来自 family_086；只保留研发工单物料需求明细，不抽取成本、料费或加工费指标。
draft only; must pass guard and manual approval before execution

template.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  jh.Company AS [公司],
  jh.JobNum AS [工单号],
  jh.PartNum AS [产品编号],
  jh.PartDescription AS [产品描述],
  jh.ProjectID AS [项目编号],
  ja.AssemblySeq AS [装配序号],
  ja.PartNum AS [装配物料],
  jm.MtlSeq AS [物料序号],
  jm.PartNum AS [需求物料],
  jm.Description AS [物料描述],
  jm.RequiredQty AS [需求数量],
  jm.IssuedQty AS [已发数量],
  jm.RequiredQty - jm.IssuedQty AS [未发数量]
FROM Erp.JobHead jh
LEFT JOIN Erp.JobAsmbl ja ON ja.Company = jh.Company AND ja.JobNum = jh.JobNum
LEFT JOIN Erp.JobMtl jm ON jm.Company = ja.Company AND jm.JobNum = ja.JobNum AND jm.AssemblySeq = ja.AssemblySeq
WHERE (@companyScope IS NULL OR jh.Company = @companyScope)
  AND (@jobNum IS NULL OR jh.JobNum = @jobNum)
  AND (@parentPartNum IS NULL OR jh.PartNum = @parentPartNum)
  AND (@materialPartNum IS NULL OR jm.PartNum = @materialPartNum)
  AND (@onlyUnissued = 0 OR jm.RequiredQty > jm.IssuedQty)
template.notes: 草稿来自 family_086；只保留研发工单物料需求明细，不抽取成本、料费或加工费指标。
joins: Erp.JobAsmbl -> Erp.JobMtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
Erp.PartTran -> Erp.JobAsmbl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
Erp.JobHead -> Erp.PartTran ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
Erp.JobHead -> Erp.PartTran ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum + PartNum
Erp.Project -> Erp.JobMtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
sourceReportNames: 研发工单BOM加工费发放查询
研发工单物料发放情况查询

validation.name: 研发工单物料需求查询

compileValidation.templateName: 研发工单物料需求查询
compileValidation.expandedCompileSql:
SELECT TOP 0 * FROM (
SELECT
  jh.Company AS [公司],
  jh.JobNum AS [工单号],
  jh.PartNum AS [产品编号],
  jh.PartDescription AS [产品描述],
  jh.ProjectID AS [项目编号],
  ja.AssemblySeq AS [装配序号],
  ja.PartNum AS [装配物料],
  jm.MtlSeq AS [物料序号],
  jm.PartNum AS [需求物料],
  jm.Description AS [物料描述],
  jm.RequiredQty AS [需求数量],
  jm.IssuedQty AS [已发数量],
  jm.RequiredQty - jm.IssuedQty AS [未发数量]
FROM Erp.JobHead jh
LEFT JOIN Erp.JobAsmbl ja ON ja.Company = jh.Company AND ja.JobNum = jh.JobNum
LEFT JOIN Erp.JobMtl jm ON jm.Company = ja.Company AND jm.JobNum = ja.JobNum AND jm.AssemblySeq = ja.AssemblySeq
WHERE ('jctimes' IS NULL OR jh.Company = 'jctimes')
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR jh.JobNum = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR jh.PartNum = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR jm.PartNum = NULL)
  AND (0 = 0 OR jm.RequiredQty > jm.IssuedQty)
) AS draft_validate

template.name: 库存安全库存查询
template.questionPattern: 查询库存、库位库存和低于安全库存的物料
template.normalizedQuestion: 库存 / 库龄 / 呆滞库存

joins: Erp.Part -> Erp.PartWhse ON Company + PartNum + WarehouseCode
sourceReportNames: 中国式库存记录增加消耗值
总厂配件仓中国式库存记录 呆滞品
澄江常备库存使用报表
中国式库存记录自动刷新
总厂配件仓中国式库存记录
limitations: 草稿来自 family_089；保留库存和安全库存判断，库龄/呆滞口径后续人工确认。
draft only; must pass guard and manual approval before execution

template.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  pb.Company AS [公司],
  pb.PartNum AS [物料编号],
  p.PartDescription AS [物料描述],
  pb.WarehouseCode AS [仓库],
  pb.BinNum AS [库位],
  pb.LotNum AS [批次],
  pb.OnhandQty AS [库位库存],
  pw.SafetyQty AS [安全库存],
  CASE WHEN pw.SafetyQty > 0 AND pb.OnhandQty <= pw.SafetyQty * 0.9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [是否低于安全库存]
FROM Erp.PartBin pb
LEFT JOIN Erp.Part p ON p.Company = pb.Company AND p.PartNum = pb.PartNum
LEFT JOIN Erp.PartWhse pw ON pw.Company = pb.Company AND pw.PartNum = pb.PartNum AND pw.WarehouseCode = pb.WarehouseCode
WHERE (@companyScope IS NULL OR pb.Company = @companyScope)
  AND (@partNum IS NULL OR pb.PartNum = @partNum)
  AND (@warehouseCode IS NULL OR pb.WarehouseCode = @warehouseCode)
  AND (@binNum IS NULL OR pb.BinNum = @binNum)
  AND (@onlyBelowSafety = 0 OR (pw.SafetyQty > 0 AND pb.OnhandQty <= pw.SafetyQty * 0.9))
template.notes: 草稿来自 family_089；保留库存和安全库存判断，库龄/呆滞口径后续人工确认。
joins: Erp.Part -> Erp.PartWhse ON Company + PartNum + WarehouseCode
sourceReportNames: 中国式库存记录增加消耗值
总厂配件仓中国式库存记录 呆滞品
澄江常备库存使用报表
中国式库存记录自动刷新
总厂配件仓中国式库存记录

compileValidation.expandedCompileSql:
SELECT TOP 0 * FROM (
SELECT
  pb.Company AS [公司],
  pb.PartNum AS [物料编号],
  p.PartDescription AS [物料描述],
  pb.WarehouseCode AS [仓库],
  pb.BinNum AS [库位],
  pb.LotNum AS [批次],
  pb.OnhandQty AS [库位库存],
  pw.SafetyQty AS [安全库存],
  CASE WHEN pw.SafetyQty > 0 AND pb.OnhandQty <= pw.SafetyQty * 0.9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [是否低于安全库存]
FROM Erp.PartBin pb
LEFT JOIN Erp.Part p ON p.Company = pb.Company AND p.PartNum = pb.PartNum
LEFT JOIN Erp.PartWhse pw ON pw.Company = pb.Company AND pw.PartNum = pb.PartNum AND pw.WarehouseCode = pb.WarehouseCode
WHERE ('jctimes' IS NULL OR pb.Company = 'jctimes')
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR pb.PartNum = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR pb.WarehouseCode = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR pb.BinNum = NULL)
  AND (0 = 0 OR (pw.SafetyQty > 0 AND pb.OnhandQty <= pw.SafetyQty * 0.9))
) AS draft_validate

template.name: 报工资源群组查询
template.questionPattern: 查询报工明细使用的资源群组辅助字典
template.normalizedQuestion: 报工明细 / 资源群组辅助

sourceReportNames: 总厂圆模详细记录(聂工)
limitations: 草稿来自 family_092；作为报工明细的资源群组参数辅助查询。
draft only; must pass guard and manual approval before execution

template.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  rg.Company AS [公司],
  rg.ResourceGrpID AS [资源群组],
  rg.Description AS [资源群组名称],
  rg.JCDept AS [部门编号]
FROM Erp.ResourceGroup rg
WHERE (@companyScope IS NULL OR rg.Company = @companyScope)
  AND (@resourceGroupId IS NULL OR rg.ResourceGrpID = @resourceGroupId)
  AND (@descriptionLike IS NULL OR rg.Description LIKE CONCAT('%', @descriptionLike, '%'))
  AND rg.Description NOT LIKE N'%删除%'
template.notes: 草稿来自 family_092；作为报工明细的资源群组参数辅助查询。
sourceReportNames: 总厂圆模详细记录(聂工)

compileValidation.expandedCompileSql:
SELECT TOP 0 * FROM (
SELECT
  rg.Company AS [公司],
  rg.ResourceGrpID AS [资源群组],
  rg.Description AS [资源群组名称],
  rg.JCDept AS [部门编号]
FROM Erp.ResourceGroup rg
WHERE ('jctimes' IS NULL OR rg.Company = 'jctimes')
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR rg.ResourceGrpID = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR rg.Description LIKE CONCAT('%', NULL, '%'))
  AND rg.Description NOT LIKE N'%删除%'
) AS draft_validate

SELECT TOP 0 * FROM (
SELECT
  p.Company AS [公司],
  p.PartNum AS [物料编号],
  p.PartDescription AS [物料描述],
  p.ProdCode AS [产品群组],
  pw.WarehouseCode AS [仓库],
  wh.Description AS [仓库名称],
  pb.BinNum AS [库位],
  wb.Description AS [库位描述],
  pw.OnHandQty AS [仓库库存],
  pb.OnhandQty AS [库位库存]
FROM Erp.Part p
LEFT JOIN Erp.PartWhse pw ON pw.Company = p.Company AND pw.PartNum = p.PartNum
LEFT JOIN Erp.PartBin pb ON pb.Company = pw.Company AND pb.PartNum = pw.PartNum AND pb.WarehouseCode = pw.WarehouseCode
LEFT JOIN Erp.Warehse wh ON wh.Company = pw.Company AND wh.WarehouseCode = pw.WarehouseCode
LEFT JOIN Erp.WhseBin wb ON wb.Company = pb.Company AND wb.WarehouseCode = pb.WarehouseCode AND wb.BinNum = pb.BinNum
WHERE ('jctimes' IS NULL OR p.Company = 'jctimes')
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR p.PartNum = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR p.PartDescription LIKE CONCAT('%', NULL, '%'))
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR pw.WarehouseCode = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR pb.BinNum = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR p.ProdCode = NULL)
  AND (0 = 0 OR COALESCE(pb.OnhandQty, pw.OnHandQty, 0) <> 0)
) AS draft_validate

  jh.PartNum AS [产品编号],
  jh.PartDescription AS [产品描述],
  jh.ProjectID AS [项目编号],
  ja.AssemblySeq AS [装配序号],
  ja.PartNum AS [装配物料],
  jm.MtlSeq AS [物料序号],
  jm.PartNum AS [需求物料],
  jm.Description AS [物料描述],
  jm.RequiredQty AS [需求数量],
  jm.IssuedQty AS [已发数量],
  jm.RequiredQty - jm.IssuedQty AS [未发数量]
FROM Erp.JobHead jh
LEFT JOIN Erp.JobAsmbl ja ON ja.Company = jh.Company AND ja.JobNum = jh.JobNum
LEFT JOIN Erp.JobMtl jm ON jm.Company = ja.Company AND jm.JobNum = ja.JobNum AND jm.AssemblySeq = ja.AssemblySeq
WHERE ('jctimes' IS NULL OR jh.Company = 'jctimes')
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR jh.JobNum = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR jh.PartNum = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR jm.PartNum = NULL)
  AND (0 = 0 OR jm.RequiredQty > jm.IssuedQty)
) AS draft_validate

SELECT TOP 0 * FROM (
SELECT
  pb.Company AS [公司],
  pb.PartNum AS [物料编号],
  p.PartDescription AS [物料描述],
  pb.WarehouseCode AS [仓库],
  pb.BinNum AS [库位],
  pb.LotNum AS [批次],
  pb.OnhandQty AS [库位库存],
  pw.SafetyQty AS [安全库存],
  CASE WHEN pw.SafetyQty > 0 AND pb.OnhandQty <= pw.SafetyQty * 0.9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [是否低于安全库存]
FROM Erp.PartBin pb
LEFT JOIN Erp.Part p ON p.Company = pb.Company AND p.PartNum = pb.PartNum
LEFT JOIN Erp.PartWhse pw ON pw.Company = pb.Company AND pw.PartNum = pb.PartNum AND pw.WarehouseCode = pb.WarehouseCode
WHERE ('jctimes' IS NULL OR pb.Company = 'jctimes')
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR pb.PartNum = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR pb.WarehouseCode = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR pb.BinNum = NULL)
  AND (0 = 0 OR (pw.SafetyQty > 0 AND pb.OnhandQty <= pw.SafetyQty * 0.9))
) AS draft_validate

SELECT TOP 0 * FROM (
SELECT
  rg.Company AS [公司],
  rg.ResourceGrpID AS [资源群组],
  rg.Description AS [资源群组名称],
  rg.JCDept AS [部门编号]
FROM Erp.ResourceGroup rg
WHERE ('jctimes' IS NULL OR rg.Company = 'jctimes')
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR rg.ResourceGrpID = NULL)
  AND (NULL IS NULL OR rg.Description LIKE CONCAT('%', NULL, '%'))
  AND rg.Description NOT LIKE N'%删除%'
) AS draft_validate
